content.full_text:
JAMES A. JACKMAN
ATTORNEY AT LAW
617 NORTH BROADWAY
SANTA ANA, CALIFORNIA 92701
(714) 547-3971 : (714) 543-9451

November 12, 1976


Michael Bennett
Executive Director
State of California
Fair Political Practices Commission
Post Office Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804

Re: Statement of Economic Interests

Dear Mr. Bennett:

     This will acknowledge receipt of your letter of October 29, 1976. I must confess that I don't recall the exact period of time involved in the filing in which I refused to disclose the names of clients who had paid me fees in excess of $1,000. I would appreciate it if you would remind me of that so that I may assemble that information.

     However, I must tell you that my initial reaction is that the Mendocino County Superior Court is in error in its conclusions of law. However, before I decide whether or not I will comply with your request of October 29th, I will discuss the matter in greater detail with my attorneys. It may be that I would prefer to litigate the matter down here or await an Appellate Court decision. However, for the time being please advise of the dates involved so that I may assemble client names.

                                        Very truly yours,

                                        [signature]
                                        James A. Jackman

JAJ/c

[illegible] it u
at red
